_comment: v1.2 domain-audit scenarios. Separate file so reseed is safe. PO-FOB-1 is a buyer-arranged (FOB) supplier PO; PO-FOB-1-FF is its parallel freight-forwarder PO (A19). Demonstrates that EXW/FOB awards emit a freight-forwarder PO covering freight/insurance/customs.

purchaseOrders.narrative: Freight-forwarder PO for PO-FOB-1 (incoterm FOB, buyer-arranged): covers freight, insurance, and customs clearing. Seller-arranged incoterms (CIF/CFR) would not emit one.
